title: Active Competency Sets Configuration
description: Per-cycle competency assignments. Top-level keys are Role Family codes; under each family, the literal key "baseline" plus one key per permitted specialization code. Each leaf is keyed by cycle ID and holds an array of competency codes.

familyEntry.description: Baseline plus zero or more specialization sets for the family. Keys: "baseline" (literal) and zero or more specialization codes (uppercase, alphanumeric with underscores).

cycleMap.description: Per-cycle competency codes for this (family, baseline-or-specialization) tuple.
